facts: Zhang Wei is a backend engineer.

The user works at StartupA as an intern.
The user got promoted to junior engineer at StartupA.
The user left StartupA and joined BigCorp as senior engineer.
The user's salary was 10k per month.
The user's salary increased to 25k per month at BigCorp.
The user lived in a rented apartment downtown.
The user bought a house in the suburbs.
The user's manager is Director Sun.
Director Sun previously led the cloud division.
The cloud division was acquired by Oracle in 2024.
The user's mentor is Professor Lin.
Professor Lin teaches at Tsinghua University.
Tsinghua University is located in Beijing.
The user is allergic to peanuts and shellfish.
The user practices intermittent fasting, eating only between noon and 8pm.
The user has a phobia of public speaking.
The user is fluent in Mandarin, English, and basic Japanese.
